NAVAREA XIX 2/23
 1. RIGLIST. CORRECT AT  011830 UTC JAN 23
 NORWEGIAN SEA: NORTH OF 65N, EAST OF 5W.
 65-01.5N 006-52.8E TRANSOCEAN ENCOURAGE
 66-50.7N 005-03.1E DEEPSEA STAVANGER
 71-24,1N 022-30,4E TRANSOCEAN ENABLER
 NOTES:
 A. RIGS ARE PROTECTED BY A 500 METRE SAFETY ZONE.
 B. FOR RIGS LOCATED SOUTH OF 65N, REFER TO NAVAREA I WARNINGS OR VISIT WWW.UKHO.GOV.UK/RNW
 2. CANCEL NAVAREA XIX　171/22
